subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling in the divine garden of knowledge, favored by the grace and bounty of the All-Merciful Sun and the outpouring of the heavenly clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان معرفت الهی از فضل و موهبت شمس رحمانی و فیض غمام صمدانی و لواقح
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
